notable_quotes: Oh my god. Is my computer breaking? This isn't good.
I can't even see my ears really.
Ooh, wait. What is up with that accent color?
What is up with that accent color?
priority_actions: Add animated loading assets or a percentage bar to the 0:52 transition to mitigate hardware anxiety.
Enable auto-rotation for the character creator camera when selecting side-of-head features like ears.
Clarify secondary color slider functions (Accent/Blemish) through better labeling or conditional UI visibility.
Verify that high-fidelity textures, which the player praised at 5:01, remain consistent across all customization sub-menus.
top_highlight: One thing I am really looking forward to in this game is the music. That’s always a huge, huge piece for me.
